title: The Severed Faith (Horror)
description: A phycological slow burn ARG horror mod, Based on Voices of the void, with inspiration from The Broken Script.
body:
# The Severed Faith

![starboy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa9aa82675cc1ba3f17d0da5b35c0ea394093276.jpeg)

A psychological slow burn horror experience imitating Minecraft Alpha esthetic.

Based on Voices of the Void.


**
Requires Geckolib**

**Discord for bug reports and information**





In an empty world, being hunted, stalked watched. They see you, always. 

This mod contains flashing lights, sudden visual effects, and graphic imagery that may be disturbing or triggering to some players.
Individuals with a history of photosensitive epilepsy or sensitivity to gore/horror content are advised to proceed with caution.



**Warnings:
**
Almost every shader will break weather events.

This mod will modify your worlds.

This mod will kick you from the game.

This mod will cause irreparable damage to game files eventually.

Do not look at them.

Do not talk to them.

Do-not-log-off._



Minecraft: 1.20.1



Forge: 47.3.0+

Mod Tooling: Built using MCreator and GeckoLib



Performance: Optimized for single-player and modded survival worlds

Discord for bug reports and chaos again: [https://discord.gg/y4kMh9aWmg](https://discord.gg/y4kMh9aWmg)


![angels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caf389aa330688b1a1c39d41c601dfe720761ff1.png)

When I wonder why What's never been's never been so We would lie when we say, "yes, you know we all love you" what's never been's never been so Hell, we're nowhere now.



cluv431 txp ebob.
